rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF RE: ELIOT BJORNEBY FOX, DECEASED
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #8, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/9/22. (No earlier availability.) The proof of service filed on 5/25/22 shows an incomplete address for Shaare Zedek. If notice was correctly mailed to the FULL address, just a new proof of service needs to be filed. If notice was mailed as shown on the proof of service, notice of hearing must be mailed to that entity for the 8/9/22 hearing. It is not necessary to give notice to parties who already received proper notice when a hearing is continued. [Probate Code Section 1205.] A courtesy copy of the proof of service of notice to the correct, complete address for Shaare Zedek must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 7/29/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DONALD LEE JERRYSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/2/22. (No earlier availability.) Until there is a personal representative of the estate of the post-deceased beneficiary, the accounting cannot be approved. (The will dated 2/7/19, not 2/5/19, was admitted on 10/30/19, not 11/1/19. The Final I&A was filed on 6/17/20, not 6/2/20. The informational I&A was filed on 9/10/21, not 6/17/20. The accounting period ended 6/15/21, not 3/23/21. The second named executor is no longer an interested party.) Why did the executor not immediately liquidate (speculative) securities?

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ZETHER MCGRIGER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/23/22. (No earlier availability.) No courtesy copies. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C.] No proposed order. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] If this is an accounting, as the petition caption seems in part to indicate, original bank statements must be filed. [LRSF 14.34 D.] The register of actions does not reflect any proof of service of notice of this petition hearing. Courtesy copies and the proposed order must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 8/12/22 to avoid another automatic continuance. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B. (A cursory skim of the petition online indicates there are numerous errors or allegations that are inconsistent with prior filings that will need to be corrected in an amendment to the petition or a fully amended petition. Counsel might wish to review Appendix A of the SF Local Rules as well as the California Rules of Court.)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DANIEL GOMEZ URIONAGUENA & MANUELA MUNOZ DE GOMEZ REV. LIVING TRUST, U/T/A DTD 6/29/94 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Determining Title To Certain Assets
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 9, 2022. the examiner would like to set this petition for hearing, but as noted in the tentative rulings for 2/22/22 and 5/3/22, there is no proper proof of service on file for the second amended petition, as the POS of the NOH filed 1/27/22 for the 2/22/22 hearing was mailed on 1/21/22, prior to the date the second amended petition was filed (1/27/22). Notice cannot be mailed prior to the date the pleading requiring notice is filed (LRSF 14.14.A.). New notice must be mailed for the continued hearing date and the POS of the NOH filed no later than noon on 8/2/22. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.

Issues raised by an examiner for LEGAL or procedural reasons should be addressed to comply with LEGAL and procedural reasons, not to comply with the examiner's notes.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MEREDITH P. ST. CLAIR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The petitioner requests her appointment as executor named in the decedent's will. Article III-1 of the will provides that: "I appoint the following persons to administer my estate: For my demise in Germany: Anne Fabbri (petitioner residing in Germany) For my demise in the USA: John Walker St. Clair & James Whitney St. Clair (decedent's two children residing in the USA)" PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE HAYS FAMILY TRUST, DATED MAY 3, 2012
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Production Of Decedent'S Will; To Compel Trustee To Provide A Copy Of Terms Of A Trust; To Report To Beneficiary Regarding A Trust; And T
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Please review Local Rule 14.1 D. for information regarding remote appearances. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Court to determine how to proceed. 2) Whether Jodi Traversaro has standing. Code sections cited on page 2 under section 1.3 do not appear to apply as the petition alleges, she is an heir at law. 3) Whether notice is proper. It appears Jill Traversaro was personally served on 01/14/2022 no other party appears to be personally served. 4) Petitioner still has not submitted the required proposed order to the Examiner in room 202. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.
